            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_small_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engines_2 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = engines_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # range_improvements â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = range_improvements
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aircraft_construction â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aircraft_construction
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # survivability_studies â€” 1939

            NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = survivability_studies
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aa_hmg â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aa_hmg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aa_cannon_1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_fighter2 â€” 1940

# â”€â”€ AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) â”€â”€

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_great_war_redux = {
    # iw_medium_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (7 techs) â”€â”€

# seaplane1
#   year=1916 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1916 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[aerial_bombs]

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[aerial_bombs]

# cv_naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_great_war_redux = {
    # seaplane1 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = seaplane1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = seaplane1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber1 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_tech = aerial_bombs
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_tech = aerial_bombs
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = cv_naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (12 techs) â”€â”€

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[aerial_bombs]

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1917 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_great_war_redux = {
    # strategic_bomber1 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_tech = aerial_bombs
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_large_airframe â€” 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reinforced_wings_mothership â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = miniature_fighters
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aerial_hangars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1917 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_great_war_redux = {
    # tactical_bomber1 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_bomber â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) â”€â”€

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_great_war_redux = {
    # early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane â€” 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter â€” 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_computing_machine
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_encryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_decryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_great_war_redux = {
    # electrical_engineering â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electrical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electrical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_fire_control_system â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = early_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # generator_battery â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = generator_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = generator_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # analytical_engine â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = analytical_engine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = analytical_engine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amplitude_modulation â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amplitude_modulation }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = amplitude_modulation
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_integrators â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_integrators }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_integrators
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_cryptography â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_cryptography }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_cryptography
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_cryptanalysis â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_cryptanalysis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_cryptanalysis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_fire_control_system â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_fire_control_system â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_radio â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electromechanical_adding_machine â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electromechanical_adding_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electromechanical_adding_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_cryptography â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_cryptography }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_cryptography
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_cryptanalysis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_cryptanalysis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_cryptanalysis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_fire_control_system â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_generator â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # encryption_machine â€” 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = encryption_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1924 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = encryption_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # decryption_machine â€” 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = decryption_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1924 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = decryption_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio_detection â€” 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # differential_analyzer â€” 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = differential_analyzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = differential_analyzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_electronic_engineering â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_electronic_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_electronic_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_radio â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # computing_machine â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_encryption â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_decryption â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_computing_machine â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_encryption â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_decryption â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_computing_machine â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_encryption â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_decryption â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_great_war_redux = {
    # powder_type_b â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = powder_type_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = powder_type_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_machine_tools â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_machine_tools }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = early_machine_tools
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # construction0 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = construction0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = construction0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # haber_process â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = haber_process }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = haber_process
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fortification1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fortification1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fortification1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # construction1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = construction1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = construction1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # double_base_propellant â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = double_base_propellant }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = double_base_propellant
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # stainless_steel â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = stainless_steel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = stainless_steel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # oil_production1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = oil_production1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = oil_production1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # machine_tools2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = machine_tools2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = machine_tools2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_equipment_conversion â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_equipment_conversion }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
