            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_machine_tools
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fuel_refining3 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fuel_refining3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # land_fort_tech_2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = land_fort_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = land_fort_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = coastal_fort_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # assembly_line_production â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = assembly_line_production }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = assembly_line_production
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fuel_refining4 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fuel_refining4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_oil_processing â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_oil_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_oil_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rubber_processing â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rubber_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rubber_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # flexible_line â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = flexible_line }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = flexible_line
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # streamlined_line â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = streamlined_line }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = streamlined_line
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fuel_refining5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = fuel_refining5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_oil_processing â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_oil_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = modern_oil_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_rubber_processing â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_rubber_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = modern_rubber_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) â”€â”€

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_great_war_redux = {
    # atomic_research â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (4 techs) â”€â”€

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_great_war_redux = {
    # cavity_magnatron â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (15 techs) â”€â”€

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[rocket_artillery]

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_great_war_redux = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_tech = rocket_artillery
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_AIR (12 techs) â”€â”€

# early_antiair
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# early_antiair1
#   year=1916 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_antiair
#   year=1917 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_antiair1
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# anti_air_building1
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# anti_air_building2
#   year=1920 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_great_war_redux = {
    # early_antiair â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = early_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_antiair1 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = early_antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_antiair â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = basic_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_antiair1 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = basic_antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # anti_air_building1 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = anti_air_building1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = anti_air_building1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # anti_air_building2 â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = anti_air_building2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = anti_air_building2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_TANK (9 techs) â”€â”€

# early_antitank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_great_war_redux = {
    # early_antitank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = early_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mountain_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ARTILLERY (33 techs) â”€â”€

# early_artillery
#   year=1890 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_field_gun
#   year=1905 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_howitzer
#   year=1905 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_mortars
#   year=1905 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# prewar_field_gun
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# prewar_howitzer
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_field_gun
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_howitzer
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_mortars
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_field_gun1
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_howitzer1
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_field_gun2
#   year=1916 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_mortars
#   year=1916 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gas_shell_tech
#   year=1916 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[basic_howitzer]

# poisonous_gas_shell_tech
#   year=1916 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[basic_howitzer]

# advanced_field_gun
#   year=1917 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_howitzer
#   year=1917 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_field_gun1
#   year=1918 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_dp_light_battery
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_great_war_redux = {
    # early_artillery â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = early_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_field_gun â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_howitzer â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_mortars â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_mortars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = basic_mortars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # prewar_field_gun â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = prewar_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = prewar_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # prewar_howitzer â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = prewar_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = prewar_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_field_gun â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_field_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_field_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_howitzer â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_howitzer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_howitzer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_mortars â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_mortars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_mortars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_field_gun1 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_howitzer1 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_howitzer1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_howitzer1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_field_gun2 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = improved_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_mortars â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_mortars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = advanced_mortars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gas_shell_tech â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gas_shell_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_tech = basic_howitzer
        }
        add_technology = gas_shell_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # poisonous_gas_shell_tech â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = poisonous_gas_shell_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_tech = basic_howitzer
        }
        add_technology = poisonous_gas_shell_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_design]

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_design]

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1919 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1919 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1920 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1920 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_classification]

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1922 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1922 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war_redux = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = tank_classification
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank

    # advanced_heavy_tank â€” 1922

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech â€” 1943

    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech â€” 1943

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech â€” 1943

# rangers_tech2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry_great_war_redux = {
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # machine_guns â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_grenades â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1904 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = early_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons1 â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons2 â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_machine_guns â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = basic_machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_grenades â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = basic_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_special_forces â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_grenades â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons_2 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_infantry_weapons_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_special_forces â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_special_forces â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_machine_guns â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = improved_machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines2 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers2 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_grenades â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_grenades }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_tech = chemical_warfare_tech
        }
        add_technology = advanced_grenades
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_at â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_at
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_weapons2 â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons3 â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # extreme_environment_training â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = extreme_environment_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = extreme_environment_training
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # survival_training â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = survival_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = survival_training
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_machine_guns â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_machine_guns }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_machine_guns
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_at2 â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_at2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_weapons3 â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_infantry_weapons3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = support_weapons4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # support_weapons5 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines3 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1924 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paratroopers â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    # paratroopers2 â€” 1939

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech2 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
