    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[tank_design]

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1917 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[tank_design]

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1919 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1919 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1922 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1922 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_great_war_redux = {
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war_redux = {
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[tank_design]

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1917 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[tank_design]

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1919 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1919 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1922 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1922 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_great_war_redux = {
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_great_war_redux = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (3 techs) â”€â”€

# tech_trucks
#   year=1914 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[mechanical_engineering, magneto_ignition]

# wartime_trucks
#   year=1917 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1920 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_great_war_redux = {
    # tech_trucks â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            has_tech = mechanical_engineering
            has_tech = magneto_ignition
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # wartime_trucks â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = wartime_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = wartime_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry â€” 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_armored_motorized_military_police_tech
#   year=1938 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision
#   year=1943 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support_great_war_redux = {
    # basic_railways â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_railways }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_railways
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_train â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = basic_railways
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # narrow_gauge_railway â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = narrow_gauge_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = narrow_gauge_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # standard_gauge_railway â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = standard_gauge_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = standard_gauge_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electric_railway â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electric_railway }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = electric_railway
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_pioneers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_pioneers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_pioneers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_rangers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_rangers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_rangers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_train â€” 1910

            NOT = { has_tech = armored_train }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

    }

# â”€â”€ LAND / TANKS_GENERIC (78 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanical_engineering
#   year=1900 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# magneto_ignition
#   year=1910 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# coil_ignition
#   year=1912 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car1
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# distributor_based_ignition
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# tank_design
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# tech_armored_car_recon
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_armored_car
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[magneto_ignition]

# basic_armored_car_chassis

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[magneto_ignition]

# modern_td

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_art
#   year=1945 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_spaa
#   year=1945 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war_redux = {
    # mechanical_engineering â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # magneto_ignition â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = magneto_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = magneto_ignition
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coil_ignition â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coil_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = coil_ignition
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # distributor_based_ignition â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = distributor_based_ignition }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = distributor_based_ignition
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_design â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_design }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tank_design
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_armored_car_recon â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_armored_car_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_armored_car_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_armored_car â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_armored_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_tech = magneto_ignition
        }
        add_technology = basic_armored_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_armored_car_chassis â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_armored_car_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_tech = magneto_ignition
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_armored_car_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_armored_car â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_armored_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_armored_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_armored_car_chassis â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_armored_car_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_armored_car_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1917

            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_tech = tank_design
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

        add_technology = super_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_td â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = modern_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_art â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = modern_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_spaa â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = modern_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (21 techs) â”€â”€

# early_ship_hull_heavy

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_ship_hull_heavy

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_heavy_shell

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1916 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_shell
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war_redux = {
    # ironclad_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ironclad_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ironclad_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = pre_dreadnought_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_medium_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_medium_shell
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_shell
    # early_battlecruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship â€” 1940

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (10 techs) â”€â”€

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[scout_plane]

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_great_war_redux = {
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_tech = scout_plane
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_great_war_redux = {
    # torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = torpedo_boat_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gunboat_ship_hull_light â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunboat_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = gunboat_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sonar â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_sonar â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # modern_sonar â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # advanced_destroyer â€” 1944

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (4 techs) â”€â”€

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war_redux = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (16 techs) â”€â”€

# victorian_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1880 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# coastal_defense_ship_armor_scheme
#   year=1895 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1904 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1908 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1908 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1916 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# interwar_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_great_war_redux = {
    # victorian_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = victorian_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = victorian_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): coastal_defense_ship_armor_scheme
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_armored_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = interwar_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_great_war_redux = {
    # ironclad_artillery â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ironclad_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1880 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ironclad_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_secondary_battery â€” 1880
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_secondary_battery }
